prompt: Need build-verification tests wired into GitHub Actions for the Go HTTP API in plugins/quality-assurance/skills/smoke-test/evals/fixtures/go-http-app. Should run on every PR and block merge if anything is red.

assertions.text: Produces both the Go test code and a GitHub Actions workflow YAML wiring them in
The Go tests use the standard testing package (or a standard idiom for Go HTTP services) rather than a foreign-language runner
Workflow is configured so failures actually block the PR (sets up Go, runs the smoke target, exits non-zero on failure)
